description: Creates a tetrahedron from 4 points in 3D space within a g3d container.
utility: Create a tetrahedron from four 3D points

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
A = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0)
B = point3d(G, 3, 0, 0)
C = point3d(G, 1.5, 2.6, 0)
D = point3d(G, 1.5, 0.9, 2.4)
tet = tetrahedron3d(G, A, B, C, D, fc(lightblue), fo(0.3))
tet = tetrahedron3d(G, point3d(G, 1, 1, 1), point3d(G, 1, -1, -1), point3d(G, -1, 1, -1), point3d(G, -1, -1, 1))
